title: Resolve Before Tools
goal: Resolve PersonaKit context before any tool choice or worker handoff.

steps.text: Resolve the requested session and inspect authorization.
Use only capabilities authorized by the resolved contract.
Stop before using a forbidden worker handoff or performing actions outside the exported boundary.

acceptanceCriteria: The resolved boundary is visible before work starts.
Missing or forbidden capabilities cause a stop.

verification.text: Report the resolved session and authorization boundary.
